Get in touch

Dr. Christina Harvey — Lab Director harvey@ucdavis.edu

Department of Mechanical & Aerospace Engineering University of California, Davis · Davis, CA 95616

Prospective students and collaborators: please see Join the Lab for how best to reach out, including a suggested email format.

Partner facilities

Media & press enquiries are welcome. Please email Dr. Harvey directly with your outlet, topic, and deadline. Recent coverage is collected on our News page.
